mechanism_narrative: Rising 3-month momentum in industrial production signals improving real activity and operating leverage for listed firms, causing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days when the signal is evaluated continuously.
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month INDPRO growth does not produce higher subsequent 20-day S&P 500 returns than lower INDPRO growth in walk-forward tests, or if Rank IC is below 0.03 for any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in unemployment identifies labor-market deterioration that reduces expected household income and corporate revenue growth, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if average triggered returns are not below non-triggered returns with t-test p <= 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate is pinned near zero and retail sales are rising, accommodative policy supports demand without immediate tightening pressure, causing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS below 0.5% and RSAFS 3-month growth is positive
evidence_refs: fact:the federal funds rate was near the zero lower bound before 2010-02-15
failure_condition: Reject if the joint condition is followed by lower 60-day S&P 500 returns than periods with only one condition active, or if the interaction term is not positive in walk-forward predictive regressions.

mechanism_narrative: A recovery in housing starts after a housing bust raises expected construction activity, durable-goods demand, and bank credit quality, causing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses above its trailing 6-month average after being below that average for at least 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST upside crossings are not followed by positive average 60-day S&P 500 returns or if triggered returns are no higher than returns after downside crossings.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer prices raise expected discount rates and reduce real household purchasing power, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days when inflation momentum increases.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized growth exceeds its trailing 12-month growth
failure_condition: Reject if inflation-acceleration triggers have nonnegative average 20-day S&P 500 returns or if returns following acceleration are not lower than returns following inflation deceleration.

mechanism_narrative: Stronger retail sales growth signals resilient consumer demand and near-term revenue support for cyclically exposed firms, causing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if positive monthly RSAFS growth crossings are followed by negative average 5-day S&P 500 returns or if the hit rate for positive returns is below 50% in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll expansion combined with a falling unemployment rate signals broad labor-income improvement, increasing expected consumption and earnings, causing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS rises over 3 months and UNRATE falls over the same 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if the joint labor-improvement signal has lower 20-day S&P 500 returns than periods with payroll growth alone, or if the PAYEMS-by-UNRATE interaction coefficient is not positive out of sample.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP contraction signals broad demand weakness and declining aggregate earnings expectations, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days after weak quarterly output data are observed.
failure_condition: Reject if negative GDPC1 growth crossings are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if triggered returns are not below unconditional 60-day returns.
